description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, build-service and assemble, and global before_script that runs df -h and after_script that runs ls -la. In the build-service stage add a build-service job that uses the openjdk:11-jre image, runs ./gradlew clean build singleJar --info, and stores the resulting JAR files matching service/build/libs/*.jar as artifacts that expire in one month. In the assemble stage add an assemble job that uses the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service, defines a PASSWORD variable with value, echoes PASSWORD $PASSWORD, changes directory to service, and builds the Docker image loxal/muctool:latest with docker build --pull --tag loxal/muctool:latest . . The assemble job also defines an environment named main with URL https://muctool.de. No additional rules, caches, or deployment targets are defined.
